---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for RL Stats
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: []
---

## Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?
- Is there something you can't do with the current version?
- Does it save time or improve the user experience?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
- Does this feature depend on data the Rocket League Stats API provides?
- Are there similar features in other apps or tools?

## Willingness to Contribute
- [ ] I am willing to submit a PR to implement this feature
- [ ] I can help test this feature
- [ ] I can provide UI/UX mockups or designs
